pr.title:
Non-record: Knowledge Distillation — A Negative
  Result (val_bpb=1.1553)

output.summary: Cached top-32 teacher logits and swept hard/soft distillation mixes to see if extra signal can beat the overhead within a ten-minute training budget.
techniques: Cached teacher top-32 logits for soft KL distillation to minimize online overhead
Compared hard vs soft distillation alphas while tracking step penalties
Extended runs to see if distillation benefits outrun cached-logit costs over time
